name: Vakif Finansal Kiralama A.S.
summary: Vakif Finansal Kiralama A.S., together with its subsidiary, Varkif Sigorta Aracilik Hizmetleri Limited Sirketi, provides financial leasing services in Turkey. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Vakif Finansal Kiralama A.S. is a subsidiary of T√É¬ºrkiye Vakiflar Bankasi T√É¬ºrk Anonim Ortakligi.
